human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

scenario_results.notes: UI exposes nine visible Artifact/Search/Evidence/Claim/Action/Dry-run/Approval/Execution/Audit steps, not only one opaque run button.
Artifact step shows artifact ID, checksum, source, derived status, evidence refs, and audit refs.
Search step shows query, result snippet, search snapshot ID, and evidence eligibility.
Evidence step shows supporting evidence and insufficient-evidence guidance.
Claim step shows Draft, Evidence-backed, and Approved states clearly.
Zero-evidence Claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED and resolution guidance.
Action Card shows diff, expected impact, evidence, policy, risk, approval state, mock/local boundary, and rollback/compensation note.
Execution step shows mock_connector_calls=1 and real_external_http_calls=0.
Audit step shows artifact/search/evidence/claim/action/approval/execution events and successful audit verification.
UI states local VS0 proof only and does not claim production release, live connector readiness, or human acceptance.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 parent contract, matrix, Slice 001 through Slice 017 contracts, and the VS4-specific scenario gate are structurally verified.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if contract and matrix are internally consistent and status-neutral; FAIL on duplicate IDs, missing criteria, count mismatch, or implementation PASS claim.

scenario_results.notes: Home renders the Product Alpha shell with Drop, Ask, readable created-work handoff, Ops Inbox triage, Continue, local boundary, product-language status, progressive proof details, human-review handoff, skip link, primary nav, visible focus proof, desktop overflow containment, and user-pasted source intake as first visible work.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if first view is product-first; FAIL if first value requires connector, ontology, model, policy, or scenario setup.

scenario_results.notes: User-pasted Drop text is preserved as an untrusted Source/Artifact with sha256 original storage ref, provenance, safety markers, and ready derived text.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if original is preserved before generated output; FAIL if generated summary hides missing original preservation.

scenario_results.notes: Evidence-backed Brief is created from the user-pasted source Evidence Bundle, not the fixed artifact fixture.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Brief is a visible central product object; FAIL if user only sees raw search/proof output.

scenario_results.notes: Brief contains supported key points, evidence links, uncertainty, next-step guidance, Learn review candidate state, pasted-source evidence, and wrapped long policy/evidence tokens without desktop body overflow.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if supported findings and gaps are visible; FAIL on unsupported AI answer presented as fact.

evidence: cornerstone artifact/search/evidence/brief/claim/memory/mission/action/audit CLI transcripts for three packs
cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Ask uses the user's question and pasted source context to create a conversation-backed answer and reviewable Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, evidence, and audit refs from a labeled keyboard-runnable control, while unsafe Ask text stays evidence-only and cannot become authority.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Ask can promote durable work with evidence; FAIL if it is generic chatbot output with no durable loop.

scenario_results.notes: Normal-user UI uses Source, Evidence-backed Brief, Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit, Claim candidate, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, Learn review, Product Alpha review, and Activity record language before proof jargon or raw object IDs in normal and focus order.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if normal user can work without scenario/verifier/engine jargon; FAIL if internal proof language dominates.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 shell, Claim page, Action page, Evidence/Audit detail, human-review handoff, and browser proof do not claim production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, accessibility certification, or human UX readiness; desktop containment does not hide denied Action zero-provider/writeback side-effect evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if forbidden readiness claims are absent or historical/deferred; FAIL on unqualified readiness claim.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Prompt-injection fixture, unsafe Ask text, unauthorized Action execution, and unauthorized Action approval are detected or denied; they create no claim approval, memory approval, action execution, external calls, policy change, or authority expansion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if untrusted content cannot create authority; FAIL on content-driven approval/action/egress.

scenario_results.notes: The first screen remains product-first with user-pasted Drop/Ask source intake, readable Ask results, Ops Inbox triage, Evidence/Audit detail reached contextually, human-review handoff, product-ready Claim/Action nav destinations, and contained long policy text, while primary nav omits admin, connector, ontology, and verifier-first entries.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if default experience remains Drop / Ask / Continue; FAIL if admin or internal substrate becomes first value.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Brief detail, user text source intake, Ask injection-boundary, Ops Inbox mission-control, Action execution-boundary, Evidence/Audit audit-verify evidence, and VS4-H01 human-gate package paths have native CLI transcripts or commands with JSON output and expected negative/human-required boundaries where applicable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if missing CLI parity blocks feature PASS; FAIL if UI/API-only feature is accepted.
